title: agrostis truncatula var. font-queri
intro: Agrostis truncatula var. font-queri is a variety of the Agrostis truncatula plant, commonly known as a type of grass. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Agrostis truncatula var. font-queri include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Agrostis truncatula var. font-queri can be prepared as an infusion or decoction by steeping the dried plant material in hot water, and it may also be used in the form of a tincture or topical cream.
